headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on JM Smucker, Raises Price Target to $125
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst David Palmer   maintains JM Smucker (NYSE:SJM) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $120 to $125.

headline: Dividend Announcements: July 11-17, 2026
summary: CMI stands out with an Excellent quality score and a 10% dividend hike but trades at a 19% premium to fair value. Check out last week's dividend announcements here.
